desc: The invincible sword shattered the dark. The seed of courage and faith sprouted, leaving evils nowhere to hide.

name: Momo's Star Power
desc: This radiant stage—where dreams molt into wings. On tiptoe, she chases her own fragment of light.

name: Momo's Star Realm
desc: Seeing Little Fish smile, courage stirs within her. Everyone moves forward—she won't stop because of one setback.

name: Radiant Venture
desc: With Nikki, even waiting for the train is enjoyable. Excitement grows stronger, meow!

name: Tender Heartbeat
desc: Year after year, Isua lived the same life. She knew every hymn and saint, yet had never stepped beyond the walls.

name: Hymn of Radiance
desc: On cold nights, children gathered by the fire to hear Isua's tales—not of saints, but of warmth in winter's chill.

name: Silent Long Night
desc: But she was too young to fully grasp this gift. One dawn, she panicked after hurting her dearest friend by mistake.

name: Nocturnal Glow
desc: Their eyes met—Vanessa smiled for the first time. 'Thank you, my teacher,' she said. Meluthiel smiled in return.

name: Phantom of the Night
desc: Legends tell how Meluthiel repelled a deadly foe, saving the kingdom from ruin with her final spell.

name: Scent of Snowfield
desc: Yet someone always tries to pluck the frost lotus atop the snowy peak. Lynn, a designer too, loved bold colors.

name: Thawing Spring
desc: One day, a new frost lotus bloomed in Lynn's garden. At noon, sunlight cast vivid hues across the two white flowers.

name: Faded Bloom
desc: Mist led Vanessa astray into a magical garden where moonlit blossoms withered the moment she stepped in.

name: Reverie Boat
desc: As dawn pierced the fog, Vanessa knew the boat had gone. She looked ahead, knowing others still awaited help.

name: Dreamseeking Skiff
desc: The girl slept aboard the boat, drifting toward fate. A smile graced her lips, perhaps for the light ahead.

name: Fluffy Cream
desc: Her breath forms little clouds that vanish in the cold. Capri rubs her hands, planning her quickest route.

name: Fluffy Cream - Coffee
desc: Use elements of flowers, clouds, or birds? Capri's mind feels like a noisy, chaotic meeting room.

name: Fluffy Cream - Cheese
desc: To excel in fierce competition, students pour all inspiration into their graduation designs.

name: Stellar Warp
desc: She goes from gazing upward to reaching the stars. Every second brings her closer to stars once only in her mind.

name: Heartbeat Resonance
desc: The wristband was identical to the one she once built for that girl in Eden. But this one carried real weight.

name: Heartbeat Resonance - Silence
desc: Her shoulders were tapped, and then her vison was blocked. Without stopping, Heimdal said, 'Good evening, Xuni.'

name: Canvas of the Heart
desc: In her dream she bore wings of color, soaring across the sky with a courage that could conquer all obstacles.

name: Dreamtide Canvas
desc: She saw the blank page as her future, which is pure, infinite, full of possibilities where all answers begin and end.

name: Mystic Canvas
desc: She gently closed her sketchbook. Let the memories rest upon the pages and never be forgotten.

name: Whispering Bamboo
desc: The maiden smiled. 'It is not too late…' she murmured. The scholar started, but the meaning slipped away.

name: Cleared Sky
desc: The mists thickened, the kettle boiled, and the scholar hurried to pour the tea. Looking up, he found himself alone.

name: Ballad of Cirrus
desc: The girl laughed with a kitten in a yellow cloak. Her laughter was carefree, brimming with vibrant energy.

name: Song of Cirrus
desc: Wow! Your style looks so pretty.' The words slipped out. Her heart seemed to speak faster than her plans.

name: Iridescent Splendor
desc: On the southern plains, a lone rider swept past Tyr soldiers and arrived swiftly at the city gates.

name: Symphony of Soaring Plumes
desc: She offered the worried citizens a reassuring smile. 'I will prevail. I will protect the Cloud City.'

name: Neon Dreamsea
desc: As the Prime Minister's secretary, Yvette faced constant reports and problems, scrambling to keep up.

name: Reverie of Neon Tides
desc: A colleague shook their head. 'Probably the Prime Minister. He was carrying a box of cookies a few days ago.'

name: Skyborne Blossom
desc: The head maid had prepped Ace's attire. She dashed to the gown and slipped into it instantly.

name: Memory of Skybloom Roses
desc: As the party ended, Ace waved at the garden exit. She seemed unaware of the countless curious eyes following her.

name: Rose Shadows
desc: Changing into her night attire, Ace watched the darkening sky, knowing a new story awaited in the city.

name: Graceful Figure
desc: It was an ordinary day in the tribe. Iset sat beneath the swaying trees, listening to the whispers of the breeze.

name: Graceful Figure - Flame
desc: Iset did not join the revelry. She sat at the edge of fire and night, watching the flames shift in silence.

name: Blossoms in Blue
desc: Snow blanketed the mountain path. A gust tore back her hood, revealing her cheeks flushed red from the cold.

name: Tangerine Bloom
desc: Sunlight gilded her lashes. She had fulfilled her grandfather's wish. The breeze brushed her hair like his hand.

name: Tangerine Drift
desc: Winter still comes, and spring may linger far behind, yet the girl knows light within will guide her path.

name: Rose in Shadows
desc: It's said that fifty years ago, the ballerina went mad and took her life. Her ghost has since haunted the theater.

name: Solo in the Dark
desc: The black swan lowered her gaze in tears, then vanished. The children, bewildered, clapped hesitantly.

name: Silent Solo
desc: The dancer was gone. In the desolate theater, only the children's scattered applause remained, earnest and warm.

name: Blossoming Miracle
desc: A small figure hunched over her sketch. Perhaps hearing footsteps, she turned around to reveal a familiar face.

name: Mirroring Clouds
desc: Layla could hear every whisper of the stars. Ancient, desolate planets circled in darkness, her only friends.

name: Phantasmic Splendor
desc: Stronger witches face harder trials. That's way Layla lingered on Desolate Island for decades.

name: Phantasmic Prism
desc: Each time she's drawn to the prism, trapped in the illusion, her memories vanish. And everything restarts.

name: Skytime Flight
desc: In her plan, the plane takes off from the rainbow, glides through the waterfall, and lands at the cliffside castle.

name: Skyward Voyage
desc: Children laugh around the giant flying chess. Rosy runs to the bunny toy, as if she's reuniting with an old friend.

name: Oath Beneath Tides
desc: Suddenly, the sea fell silent. As they rose from the deck, they glimpsed a dark figure between the waves.

name: Drifted Dream
desc: Some said the figure looked like Elena as a child. Others trembled and whispered—it didn't look like her at all.

name: Echoes of the Deep
desc: In her hand was a broken stone. Her deep eyes shimmered like stars, whispering wordless songs that stilled the storm.

name: Tide of Remnants
desc: The wind returned, and early villagers started a new day. Old secrets sank again with the tide into the deep sea.

name: Pictor Fantasy
desc: Through trials, she explored the uncharted sea and returned with her battered ship. The town welcomed her warmly.

name: Pictor's Guide
desc: With the map complete, the butterfly in her dream circled her as she rose to the sacred mountain with her easel.

name: Serene Chirp
desc: The serene mount wakes up in pleasant bird chirps... Wait, pleasant? Why do some birds sound like fighting?

name: Cool Summer Splash
desc: Coconut trees line up the shore, shadows dancing in clear sunlight. She opens the guide and heads to the first mark.

name: Garden Fairytale
desc: The giant tomatoes attract crowds from across the kingdom. People say it's a miracle of hard work and patience.

name: Midsummer's Lullaby
desc: Had she imagined it? Bebena rubbed her eyes—the fish was gone, and a glowing pearl rested in her palm.

name: Tide Glow
desc: Days of endless work drained Abby's passion. On impulse, she quit—and in that moment, felt lighter than ever before.

name: Sunset Wander
desc: With Chasing the Wind re-released, many, like Abby, rediscover their urge to seek new horizons.

name: Dusk Journey
desc: Abby's designer's travel sketches sparked a trend—journey-born inspirations that filled others with fresh energy.

name: Raindrop Whisper
desc: The lake from the song became a known spot. Many visit in the rainy season, hoping to feel what Melutin once felt.

name: Gossamer Expanse
desc: Legend says spirit foxes dwell on Qingqiu—clever, cunning, with beauty and grace beyond compare.

name: Qingqiu Driftwater
desc: Aria asked many, but the village was long gone—no one remembered the place, nor the woman who once lived there.

name: Qingqiu Palehaze
desc: Only then did Aria see—humans fade too fast, their brief warmth lingering in a spirit's heart forever.

name: Qingqiu Veilmist
desc: When Aria left Qingqiu again, nothing matched her memory. The path to the young woman's home was gone.

name: Qingqiu Frostmist
desc: This time, no villagers chased her—but no woman took her hand either, nor bandaged her wounds beneath the moonlight.

name: Iridescent Weave
desc: She was asked to craft the perfect vase—crystal clear, flawless, etched with vines to hold a flower's bloom forever.

name: Glass Petals
desc: At the latest tour, one exhibit stood out—a shattered glass vase, flowers in bloom, cradling a story from long ago.

name: Prism Haven
desc: Flowers born from ruins proved life endures. Years later, towers rose, but the blossoms remained.

name: Cookie Affection
desc: The food bar at the beach sells a parfait named Affection, with fruits and cookies topping the smooth cream.

name: Chic Silhouette
desc: Got stuck in traffic?' Jinyi responds as she pushes the office door open. Inside come cheers of surprise and joy.

name: Gilded Wind
desc: Nothing I can't handle. I'm just getting started!' The girl in red raises her chin and blinks with the same passion as always.

name: Galactic Voyage
desc: Her thoughts grew livelier at night. As the stars ascended, her curious notions wove dazzling worlds.

name: Stellar Voyage
desc: She took Lambie and soared into the sky with her jetpack, gliding through the nebulae toward the wondrous Milky Way.

name: Dreamy Voyage
desc: Stars glittered everywhere, bright as daylight. Comets swept past with fiery tails, dancing joyously around them.

name: Starshard Tale
desc: Kasim, curled by the throne, bared fangs in the dark. The palace fell to screams that shattered the silent night.

name: Starlit Whisper
desc: Kasim fell on velvet rugs. Zahra looked down at the traitor: 'You dimmed our glory—I will set it alight once more.'

name: Stardust Fable
desc: None dared meet Zahra's gaze as she stood in blood. Outside, her flame rose, burning fear and shadow from the land.

name: Dream Blossoms
desc: Long ago, a Lilith legend spoke about a girl named Dalf, who could freely communicate with all water creatures.

name: Crystal Streams
desc: To this day, Lilith people still believe magical creatures are searching for the most beautiful flowers for Dalf.

name: Rosy Tale
desc: Milia blew kisses from her balloon. The audience eagerly gathered the invitations, eager for the next act.

name: Starry Sea Oath
desc: Silent whispers of starlight pierce the void - faint as fireflies, yet brightening the endless dark.

name: Starry Sea Memory - Glow
desc: The stars always respond to every gaze. Their answers may vary, but hope kindles in every heart.

name: Nebula Voyage
desc: The gleaming stars are this land's watchful eyes. Rising flames of desire will ash, all returning to silent oblivion.

name: Porcelain Riddle
desc: Why does the baker touch his nose when speaking? He's allergic. The missing child? Fell asleep during hide-and-seek.

name: Code of Elegance
desc: Wherever a case may arise, Lottie and Bono will be there without delay. They're the finest pair in pursuit of truth!

name: Emerald Dream
desc: The queen named her daughter Lantis, after the fabled flower, hoping the princess, too, would protect her people.

name: Emerald Repose
desc: As flowers unfurled, fragrance swept the land, banishing the disease. Amid the flowers, the princess opened her eyes.

name: Fragrant Dreamgate
desc: The chest has no magic. It holds theme park tickets. Lonna has long wished to go, but illness keeps her from going.

name: Fairytale Bloomgate
desc: Lonna leaps into Irena's arms, tears streaming down their faces. Outside, the roses lean together in sunlight.

name: Rose in Silence
desc: Her teacher's late lover planted white roses in their garden that would bloom beautifully in spring.

name: Eternal Affection
desc: The Sound of Spring is sung by the Goddess of Spring. It symbolizes infinite life and can awaken the flowers of spring.

name: Crimson Embers
desc: The book's flyleaf bears an enigmatic phrase: 'May your soul find salvation.' Is it a blessing, or a sigh?

name: Crimson Feast
desc: How could she come? The Duke and that lady have already...' Audrey knew what they were going to say.

name: The Grand Feast
desc: Oh! I heard he'll bequeath all to her…' the crowd whispered, until a sudden scream pierced the night.

name: Stellar Secrets
desc: Veiled in shadow like the night's own stars, the fortune-teller sits, her crystal ball softly aglow.

name: Celestial Decree
desc: In the name of law and the eternal stars…' The young knight's blade scatters the darkness.

name: Moment of Spark
desc: She flips the camera and waves at him, their figures close together. Date photos are always best with a couple!

name: Sinister Torchlight
desc: Kuro moves through the alley, wand rasied, emitting a faint glow. Her magic draws the creatures lost in darkness.

name: Midnight Origins
desc: The white moon draws strange monsters unconsciously to this city of shadows. And, of course, certain humans as well.

name: Dusk's Beginning
desc: Most of them possess hidden traits, such as witches' bloodline, monsters' blessings, or a gift for alchemy…

name: Spatial Link
desc: The file center is a vast data grave, full of discarded files and dead hardware waiting for destruction.

name: Glow and Gloom
desc: Rydell Kingdom, symbol of light, stands against darkness until its last king was corrupted and went mad.

name: Resonant Inspiration
desc: Riche spent a night in the castle and dreamed she became another person, living a completely different life.

name: Nocturne Reverie
desc: Riche raised her glass at the ball as past years flickered by. She sighed at humans' trust in eternity.

name: Moonlit Remains
desc: Legends speak of a city called Veiled Moon, unseen on maps, more a projection of many cities than a real place.

name: Ash of White Moon
desc: Eternal night envelops the city, with no neon, no stars. Only the white full moon, ever fixed, watches over all.

name: Field Ballad
desc: Even the tiniest seed grows. Humble hearts hear the earth's echo. Hard work will yield bountiful fruits in autumn.

name: Glimmering Radiance
desc: Through the lens, her blonde hair flies, red dress blazes, and her smile is dreamy. She perfects the beloved role.

name: Screening of Dream
desc: A photographer clicks by instinct, catching her glance back. Ivanna winks slyly, brighter than any starlight.

name: Start of Dream
desc: The next day, the photo tops headlines. Some call it all planned; most marvel at her newfound, radiant vitality.

name: Berry Fantasy
desc: This studio can make all your dreams real: space travel, fairy worlds… Each corner filled with surprises!'

name: Berry Fantasy - Dream
desc: A bit nervous, Lulu walks through the quiet corridor. She opens her shoot room, and her eyes widen in surprise.

name: Forest Wandering
desc: She opens the envelope, revealing an invitation. Elegant script reads: 'Let us make all your dreams come true.'

name: Forest Wandering - Berry
desc: If not for the shooting outfits in the clearing, she might forget she's in a studio, not the heart of a real forest.

name: Vintage Dreams
desc: She thinks it a dull advertisement, yet her assistant's eyes light up, urging her to try this dream-making studio.

name: Vintage Dreams - Violet
desc: A streetcar slowly moves in the set. She pauses, skirt fluttering in the breeze, replying to the echoes from the era.

name: Path of Starlight
desc: Yellow flowers bloom by the roadside. Few notice, but she presses the shutter, capturing their grace in the sunset.

name: Holy Night Snow Elf
desc: The Snow Elf quickly tucks Momo into the hood and places a snowman headpiece on him. 'Shh, the ball is starting~'

name: Dazzling Weave
desc: One sunny afternoon, Gloria receives a sparkling invitation. She wins a long-awaited shoot at the dream studio.

name: Whimsical Dance
desc: In the gown, Gloria sets up the camera, humming a tune. The muse reaches out playfully, inviting her to dance.

name: Dreamlike Invite
desc: Her skirt spreads like a radiant lake with sparkling gems. The 'Dance with Muse' now begins!

name: Fragile Dreams
desc: The invitation arrived, but she barely recalled applying. She wrote 'Lakeside Impressions' before sleep took her.

name: Lakeside Reverie
desc: The shutter clicks. A long-lost bright smile returns to her. Each captured moment fuels her steps forward anew.

name: Autumn Serenity
desc: All think she is now beyond the skies, yet when geese return north, every window bears a golden chrysanthemum.

name: Silhouette in Autumn
desc: Born of wild hills, grown in mortal dust, she greets the young and sees off the old. Amid the changes, she remains.

name: Golden Sea
desc: An ancient pearl clam is her throne. The tides bring her voices and whisperings from the world's end.

name: Secret of the Tides
desc: Memories dim like fading gems. Tano recalls a faint light in the mist long ago, a warrior she thought was different.

name: Echoes of Tides
desc: Greed glints in the sailor's eyes. As before, Tano offers him priceless pearls, and he clutches them in haste.

name: Golden Pact
desc: Pearls carpet her throne, each imprisoning a greedy soul. His pearl falls among them, no different at all.

name: Gilded Cage
desc: Heavy mist veils the shining sea again. The lonely, wealthy goddess waits for the next brave soul, or the next pearl.

name: Sunny Breeze Whispers
desc: The sky turns gold at sunset. Through the crowd, Erin hugs a thick stack of postcards and enters the post office.

name: Journey in Breeze
desc: The night breeze brings in flowers and laughter. 'Happy birthday, our traveler!' comes from familiar faces.

name: Fragrance in Breeze
desc: As before, they share cake and tales from the road, bursting into laughter at Erin's playful lines.

name: Years in Blooming
desc: Which studio can truly capture her bond with the puppy? She flips through brochures, none quite right.

name: Leisurely Elegance
desc: Ava previews the photos, laughing at the blurred, excited puppy captured in the shots.

name: Aromantic Grace
desc: She rubs the puppy's head. Their shared moments are her most valued treasures, preserved forever with the photos.

name: Inspired Couture
desc: Regaining confidence, Mimi makes one beautiful outfit after another. Word spreads, and her cabin is bustling.

name: Pen of Inspiration
desc: With spring's arrival, the forest hosts a grand fashion show. The once doubtful elf now shines as a chief designer.

name: Winter Snow Ballad
desc: She wakes gently, gazing at her book. The bear cheers her on in the picture, with the snowy town behind it.

name: Winter Snow Lullaby
desc: The long-sealed window opens. Snowflakes and laughter pour in. She hums a lively tune, resting her chin by the sill.

name: Rosy Dream Waltz
desc: She wound the key, and cheerful carols flowed as the doll spun with drifting snow, like a dream brought to life.

name: Crystal Snowdream
desc: She understood then: these brilliant colors were her best friend's gift—Snowy's answer to what the world could be.

name: Prelude in Snow
desc: Warm fire danced in Loryn's hearth, yet the streets outside lay silent, wrapped in heavy snow that muffled all sound.

name: Snowladen Ballad
desc: Born from humankind's pure wishes, Lalati glows with drifting stardust and snowlight woven into her dress.

name: Starry Night Chimes
desc: The streets grow quiet. Soft starlight circles Lalati as every glowing star holds a precious heartfelt wish.

name: Frostlit Verse
desc: Her figure fades into dawn. When the next festival comes, her blessings will return once more with the ringing bells.

name: Gala of Emerald Hues
desc: The parade ends in triumph. Risa takes the title of Queen of Carnival. She smiles, feeling calmer than she expects.

name: Spring on the Fields
desc: Emerald Valley rests among green hills, streams mirror woods, clover fills the land, and people work at dawn and rest at dusk.

name: Emerald Wilds Magic
desc: March winds sweep the valley. Dressed for the feast, people gather as songs and rich aromas of wine drift across green fields.

name: Deadly Banquet
desc: Beneath the prosperity, corruption grows. Carol receives a mission to investigate a high official selling intel.

name: Nightfall Menace
desc: In a splendid gown, she commands every ballroom. The dress is armor; she steps through blood as if over fallen petals.

name: Deadly Night
desc: In a loose hoodie and black cap, she becomes an unseen hacker, drifting through torrents of data.

name: Daybreak Blade
desc: In the hit novel Shadowed Menace, Morton seems a gentleman yet is cold at heart, except when it comes to Carol.

name: Enchanted Theater
desc: The fading troupe finds new life, brighter than before. It all begins with Fiona's all-or-nothing choice.

name: Peculiar Theater
desc: Watching the crowds, Fiona understands: life is ever-changing, like the theater. Tomorrow's turn may begin today.
